description_long: This object is a heavily weathered, metallic machine gun with a complex, angular frame and exposed mechanical components. The body features a prominent cylindrical barrel assembly, surrounded by a lattice of support struts and brackets, giving it an industrial, utilitarian appearance. Several levers, knobs, and mounting points are visible, suggesting manual operation and adjustment. The surface is predominantly dark, with patches of rust and wear, indicating extensive use and exposure to the elements. A rectangular plate with engraved markings is attached to one side, possibly for identification or instructions. The overall construction is robust, with a mix of solid and open sections, and the design appears optimized for durability and field maintenance.
description: A rugged, metallic machine gun with a cylindrical barrel, exposed mechanical parts, and a weathered, industrial finish. The frame is reinforced with struts and features a mounted identification plate.
description_view_0: This view highlights the cylindrical barrel assembly and the angular support struts, with several open sections and a prominent mounting bracket visible.
description_view_1: The side view reveals a rectangular identification plate with engraved text, as well as additional mechanical linkages and a curved support structure.
description_view_2: From this angle, the open lattice framework and the rear mechanical components are more visible, showing the depth and complexity of the structure.
description_view_3: This view provides a clear look at the curved base, the main barrel, and the intricate arrangement of levers and adjustment mechanisms.
attribute_barrel_type: standard cylindrical barrel with exposed mounting and support struts
attribute_mounting_mechanism: integrated mounting bracket with angular support struts
